title: Store-cli timestamp auto-population + record-usage + collate cost aggregation
description: Three related tool-layer fixes: (1) store-cli write bug auto-populates real ISO datetimes when agent supplies date-only YYYY-MM-DD values; (2) new store-cli record-usage subcommand writes token-usage sidecars programmatically; (3) collate --purge-events aggregates cost data from event files into bug markdown artifact before purging.

plan.objective: Implement three tool-layer features: bug timestamp auto-population, record-usage subcommand, and collate cost aggregation for bugs
key_changes: Added _isDateOnly, _dateOnlyToISO, _normalizeBugTimestamps helpers to store-cli.cjs for date-only timestamp detection and normalization
Added record-usage subcommand to store-cli.cjs with --input-tokens, --output-tokens, --cache-read-tokens, --cache-write-tokens, --estimated-cost-usd, --token-source, --model, --duration-minutes flags
Updated buildBugIndex in collate.cjs to accept optional costTotals parameter and render a Cost section table
Updated collate CLI to aggregate event costs for bug entities when --purge-events is used, embedding totals in bug INDEX.md before purging
Updated cmdWrite in store-cli.cjs to auto-normalize date-only bug timestamps before validation

implementation.objective: Implement three tool-layer features for FORGE-S12-T04
key_changes: store-cli.cjs: Added _isDateOnly, _dateOnlyToISO, _normalizeBugTimestamps module-level helpers for date-only YYYY-MM-DD detection and conversion to full ISO datetimes
store-cli.cjs: cmdWrite now calls _normalizeBugTimestamps(data) before validation when entity is 'bug', auto-populating time component for reportedAt/resolvedAt

store-cli.cjs: Added cmdRecordUsage subcommand with flag-based CLI (--input-tokens, --output-tokens, --cache-read-tokens, --cache-write-tokens, --estimated-cost-usd, --token-source, --model, --duration-minutes) that validates against event-sidecar schema and writes sidecar file
collate.cjs: buildBugIndex now accepts optional costTotals parameter; when provided, renders a ## Cost section with aggregated token usage table
collate.cjs: CLI section now aggregates event costs for bug entities when PURGE_EVENTS is active, passing costTotals to buildBugIndex before purging
store-cli.test.cjs: Added 25 new tests covering _isDateOnly, _dateOnlyToISO, _normalizeBugTimestamps unit tests, bug timestamp auto-population CLI tests, and record-usage CLI tests
collate.test.cjs: Added 3 new tests for buildBugIndex with cost aggregation
